title: Git Commit Conventions
desc: Commit message rules for this repo. English only — Korean wastes 2-3x tokens in git history.
steps: Language: English only — no Korean in commit title or body
Format: '<type>: <what changed and why>' — one line title under 72 chars
Types: feat / fix / refactor / test / docs / bump / chore
Body: bullet points for non-obvious details only — skip if title is self-contained
NO file listings ('- TeeTextWriter.cs, Program.cs') — describe intent, not files
Co-Authored-By line: always append 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>'
★ Bad: 'feat: TeeWriter, Program, EyeProxy 수정' / Good: 'fix: --sudo no longer spawns console window'
author: claude
